nasb.text: For I did not speak on My own initiative, but the Father Himself who sent Me has given Me a commandment as to what to say and what to speak.

esv.text: For I have not spoken on my own authority, but the Father who sent me has himself given me a commandment—what to say and what to speak.

cnv.text: 因為我沒有憑著自己說話，而是差我來的父給了我命令，要我說甚麼，講甚麼。

ccb.text: 因为我不是凭自己讲的，我说什么、讲什么都是差我来的父吩咐的。

csbs.text: 这是因为我没有凭自己讲话，而是派我来的父给了我命令，要我说什么和讲什么。
